name: keyword-extractor-ai
description: MEOK AI Labs — Extract keywords, phrases, and tags from text using TF-IDF and statistical analysis.

tools.name: extract_keywords
tools.description: Extract top keywords using TF-IDF scoring with stop word filtering and frequency analysis.

tools.name: analyze_density
tools.description: Calculate keyword density for SEO analysis, with target keyword tracking and recommendations.

tools.name: suggest_tags
tools.description: Suggest tags and categories for content based on keyword analysis and topic matching.

tools.name: compare_keywords
tools.description: Compare keywords between two texts to find common, unique, and differentiating terms.
